metaDescription: The SIT intro week 2026 for HBO-ICT. Week 1 runs the SIT Hub on the 6th with something every day, week 2 brings a hackathon and the Aloha party. Free for members.
ogDescription: SIT intro week 2026: the Hub on the 6th, the Kickoff Middag, a hackathon and the Aloha party. Become a member for {price} euro.
twitterDescription: The SIT intro week 2026 for HBO-ICT at the HvA. The Hub, Kickoff Middag, hackathon and the Aloha party.
